apihelp-query+mathwbextracts-example-1: Waxay codsataa soo koobidda walxaha xisaabta ee Wikibase.
apihelp-query+mathwbextracts-summary: Waxay soo celisaa soo koobidda shayga xisaabta ee Wikibase oo ku jira HTML.
apihelp-query+mathwbextracts-param-qid: Aqoonsiga QID ee shayga Wikibase ee la codsan doono.
apihelp-query+mathwbextracts-param-usela: Luqadda la codsanayo ee shayga Wikibase. Ingiriisigu waa luqadda caadiga ah.
